title: VASTMED 100PCs Disposable Toothbrushes Pre-Pasted Toothbrush Individually Wrapped Medium Bristle Single Use Colorful Toothbrushes for Camping, Hotels, Travel, Dental and Work
features: LUMINOSE (BRIGHT) by VASTMED 100PCS BULK QUANTITY: VASTMED package contains a bulk quantity of 100 pre-pasted disposable toothbrushes. These toothbrushes are designed to satisfy the demands of professional dentists, families, organizations, public facilities, and others who need to give toothbrushes to large groups. A practical solution for maintaining oral cleaning conveniently.

INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED: Each disposable pre-pasted toothbrush is individually wrapped to improve cleanliness and convenience. The individual packaging helps safeguard the paste on the bristles from water or dampness. This feature makes them an ideal choice for public facilities, hospitals, or guesthouses.

DURABLE AND COLORFUL DESIGN: Our disposable toothbrushes are mainly made of high-quality plastic to ensure durability and reliability. The brush head is made of stiff bristles, which have strong cleaning power and can effectively remove dirt from teeth. Our package contains a variety of colors, blue, green, red, orange, yellow, and more.

VERSATILE DISPOSABLE TOOTHBRUSHES: These pre-pasted toothbrushes are perfect for gyms, offices, schools, dental offices, and more. These adult disposable toothbrushes are also great for visitors, business travelers, hotel guests, and dental clinic patients. These pre-pasted toothbrushes make dental care possible everywhere.

100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: We provide the best service possible to our customers, as your safety and health are our concerns. Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions, we will try our best to resolve your problem to ensure you get the best shopping experience.
description: Product description Disposable Prepasted Toothbrush Individually Wrapped Soft Bristle Tooth Brush Safety Warning WARNING: Not suitable for children under 3 years. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use for purposes other than oral hygiene. After use, dispose of properly.
